title: PMW Radar Overhaul!
description: This mod makes the radar realistic and adds one new radar mode in Protomanlys Weather!
body:
# PMWAPI is Required!!!!
# Features 
Makes radar a circle

Realistic range deterioration 
![Hurricane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c914daa913c8344810aed59e94bbdd3a992ada6f.png)


Lightning detection
![Lightning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e1a46bb18522e9602ae05d52a88addcbdd62a49_0.webp)
Correlation coefficient Mode:
See debris and mixed precipitation through Correlation coefficient!
![Debris signature, Correlation Coefficient ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6416f8100de9283fee8c2e425671d852e22f29bd.png)
![Mixed Precip, correlation coefficient ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fc90cd4ab11872fd2704962ce1b1b61b0373e0e.png)

**Reflectivity Debris Balls**

Reflectivity debris balls only appear on the STRONGEST tornadoes! don't expect to see them often!
![Debris Ball Hook Echo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f39595e1d84f463206c84cec53702da048035450.png)
